channel.title: Cortex on MetaLoom
channel.description: Recent content in Cortex on MetaLoom

item.title: Artifacts
item.description: Cortex publishes JVM modules and container deployment assets separately. Maven Artifacts See Maven Artifacts for the BOM-backed module list and node dependencies.

item.title: CLI Arguments & Env Settings
item.description: Cortex is configured entirely via CLI arguments and environment variables. Environment variables can be used as drop-in replacements for CLI flags, which is convenient for container-based deployments.

item.title: Containers
item.description: Running with Docker docker run --rm \ -e LOOM_HOST=loom.internal \ -e LOOM_PORT=7733 \ -v /media/assets:/data \ metaloom/cortex:latest \ process run /data Server Mode docker run -d \ --name cortex \ -p 8093:8093 \ -e LOOM_HOST=loom.

item.title: Examples
item.description: The examples/ directory in the source repository contains two Cortex example projects. cortex-custom-node A minimal Maven project that shows how to build a custom processing node.

item.title: Features
item.description: Media Processing Cortex can process any media file type — images, videos, audio, and documents.

item.title: Maven Artifacts
item.description: All Cortex artifacts are published under the io.metaloom group and should generally be consumed with the shared BOM.

item.title: Monitoring API
item.description: Cortex exposes a lightweight monitoring/health endpoint that can be used by load balancers, Kubernetes liveness probes, and Prometheus scrapers.

item.title: Pipeline Nodes
item.description: Cortex ships with a set of built-in processing nodes. Each node has a unique name that is used to reference it in CLI --actions flags and pipeline definitions.
